## First generation of species distribution models {background-image="../../shared/assets/images/whale-shark-wide.jpg" background-size="cover" background-position="center" .section-photo}

<div class="section-title-panel">
<h2>First generation of species distribution models</h2>
<p>Initial outputs, performance, limitations, and model-improvement priorities</p>
</div>

---

## First generation of species distribution models {background-color="white" .technical-white}

<div class="sb5-header">IKI - Save the Blue 5 (SB5)</div>
<h2 class="slide-title">First generation of species distribution models</h2>

These outputs are preliminary to intermediate products intended to guide the next phase of model improvement.

- Present initial model outputs
- Review performance and ecological plausibility
- Identify limitations and assumptions
- Separate data gaps from model gaps
- Prioritize realistic improvements over the next year

<div class="sb5-footer">isaaksonbm · ibrito@conservation.org</div>

---

## Interpreting first-generation outputs {background-color="white" .technical-white}

<div class="sb5-header">IKI - Save the Blue 5 (SB5)</div>
<h2 class="slide-title">Interpreting first-generation outputs</h2>

When reviewing early species distribution model outputs, focus on whether patterns are ecologically plausible, data-supported, and useful for planning conversations.

- What patterns seem robust?
- What patterns need caution?
- Where does expert knowledge disagree with the model?
- Which improvements would most strengthen final outputs?

<div class="sb5-footer">isaaksonbm · ibrito@conservation.org</div>

---

## Feedback should be specific {background-color="white" .technical-white}

<div class="sb5-header">IKI - Save the Blue 5 (SB5)</div>
<h2 class="slide-title">Feedback should be specific</h2>

The most useful feedback identifies what can realistically improve the final outputs within the project timeline.

<div class="two-col">
<div>

**Data feedback**

- missing sources
- spatial or temporal gaps
- questionable records
- species-specific sampling issues

</div>
<div>

**Model feedback**

- implausible spatial patterns
- missing predictors
- scale or depth concerns
- uncertainty communication

</div>
</div>

<div class="sb5-footer">isaaksonbm · ibrito@conservation.org</div>
